description: 5-step canonical happy-path trace seeded at the FRAMER stage with a single-matrix selection (altshuller_39x39). Drawn from eval case norm_001_heat_exchanger.
user_prompt: Reduce heat exchanger weight without losing thermal performance.
notes: Stub artifacts planted between steps satisfy each schema's required fields with simple values. Not a behavioral test of subagent quality; this is a regression baseline for the action sequence the state-driver produces given a canonical happy-path corpus.
